data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: The site is built on a distributed set of services that handle different functions within the platform.
data.technical_spec: APIs, cloud-native deployments, service discovery, orchestration

data.title: CDN Usage
data.description: Utilizes Content Delivery Networks to ensure fast streaming and low latency across different regions.

data.title: Scalable Data Architecture
data.description: Supports large-scale data processing to cater recommendations and personalized experiences.

data.title: Dynamic Rendering
data.description: Adapts content rendering based on device capabilities and user region.

data.title: Resiliency and Fault Tolerance
data.description: Ensures service continuity with redundancy and automated failovers.
